title: requested IP address 172.18.24.103 is not available in range set 172.18.24.1-172.18.24.254

comments.body: Any chance you deleted/recreated a container using that static IP previously? We could have a leftover lease file for the IP.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
Given the lack of any further info from the reporter, I'm going to assume this will be fixed in our next release via https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/8692 and close
